case_title: JAS DHILLON VS. CFR AUTODIRECT TRUCKING LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-17-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CFR AUTODIRECT TRUCKING LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JAS DHILLON. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CFR AUTODIRECT TRUCKING LLC'S REPRESENTATIVE VICTORIA RUDENKO, CLAIMS MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DHILLON, JAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CFR AUTODIRECT TRUCKING LLC $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,670.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/06/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DHILLON, JAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
